user.title: Nefit/Bosch Easy
user.description: Enter the credentials from the Nefit/Bosch Easy app.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid serial number, access key or password.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Nefit cloud.

abort.already_configured: This Nefit Easy is already configured.

data.import_gas_history: Automatically import gas-usage history (back-fill once, then refresh daily)

error.scan_interval_too_low: The Nefit cloud rate-limits to ~60s; use 60 or more.

import_gas_history.name: Import gas-usage history
import_gas_history.description: Fetch the full daily gas-usage history from the boiler and import it into Home Assistant long-term statistics. Works regardless of the "Import gas-usage history" option (that option only controls the automatic daily refresh). Paced to respect the Nefit cloud rate limit; safe to run repeatedly (idempotent).
